Package net.sf.jailer.datamodel.filter_template

Klasse FilterTemplate

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.datamodel.filter_template.FilterTemplate
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:

public class FilterTemplate extends Object implements FilterSource
Template of Filters.

    • FilterTemplate

      Constructor.

  • Methodendetails

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Gets optional type of filter expression. Determines the type of the import-filter-mapping-table columns.
      Gibt zurück:
      the type

    • setType

      public void setType(String type)
      Sets optional type of filter expression. Determines the type of the import-filter-mapping-table columns.
      Parameter:
      type - the type to set

    • getExpression

      public String getExpression()
      Gets the filter expression (in SQL).
      Gibt zurück:
      the filter expression (in SQL)

    • setExpression

      public void setExpression(String expression)
      Sets the filter expression (in SQL).
      Parameter:
      expression - the filter expression (in SQL)

    • setApplyAtExport

      public void setApplyAtExport(boolean b)
      Sets if filter is applied at export instead of import.
      Parameter:
      b - the value

    • isApplyAtExport

      public boolean isApplyAtExport()
      Gets if filter is applied at export instead of import.
      Gibt zurück:
      the value

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Gets clear text description of what the source is.
      Angegeben von:
      getDescription in Schnittstelle FilterSource
      Gibt zurück:
      clear text description

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the name of the template.
      Gibt zurück:
      the name of the template

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the name of the template.
      Parameter:
      name - the name to set

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled()
      Returns whether the template is enabled.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the template is enabled

    • setEnabled

      public void setEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Sets whether the template is enabled.
      Parameter:
      enabled - true to enable the template

    • getClauses

      public List<Clause> getClauses()
      Gets the clauses.
      Gibt zurück:
      the clauses

    • matches

      public boolean matches(Table table, Column column)
      Checks if the template matches a given column.
      Parameter:
      table - the column's table
      column - the column
      Gibt zurück:
      true iff template is enabled and all clauses evaluates to true
